case_title: VILLARREAL, HENRY VS PASCUA, ROSELO P.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VILLARREAL, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT PASCUA, ROSELO P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-07 BY COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK-BETH WILBER, NOTHING ON RECORD. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLARREAL, HENRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PASCUA, ROSELO P. THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THE EXISTENCE OF A NUISANCE. THE JUDGMENT REDUCES THE ISSUES ADDRESSED BY PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS TO THE INDIVIDUAL PARTIES, BUT DOES NOT AFFECT ANY RIGHTS, RESPONSIBILITIES OR DUTIES OF THE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION.
